task_completion.description: Verify that a collection named 'Manuscript 2024' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left sidebar of Zotero, there should be a folder/collection named exactly 'Manuscript 2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Turing's 1936 paper is in the 'Manuscript 2024' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'Manuscript 2024' collection selected, the middle pane must list 'On Computable Numbers...' by Turing, dated 1936.

task_completion.description: Verify that Shannon's 1948 paper is in the 'Manuscript 2024' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'Manuscript 2024' collection selected, the middle pane must list 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' by Shannon, dated 1948.

task_completion.description: Verify that Vaswani et al.'s 2017 paper is in the 'Manuscript 2024' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'Manuscript 2024' collection selected, the middle pane must list 'Attention Is All You Need' by Vaswani et al., dated 2017.

task_completion.description: Verify that Silver et al.'s 2016 paper is in the 'Manuscript 2024' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'Manuscript 2024' collection selected, the middle pane must list 'Mastering the Game of Go...' by Silver et al., dated 2016.

task_completion.description: Verify that the distractor papers by Turing (1950) and Shannon (1949) are NOT in the 'Manuscript 2024' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'Manuscript 2024' collection selected, the middle pane must NOT contain 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (Turing 1950) or 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon 1949).

task_completion.description: Verify that all four target papers in the collection are tagged with 'cited'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'cited' should be visible for the target papers. This can be seen in the right pane under the 'Tags' tab when a paper is selected, in the tag selector at the bottom left of the Zotero window, or as a colored square indicator in the item list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show mouse clicks, selections, and typing within the Zotero interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Zotero application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should have the standard Zotero layout (three panes: collections, items, item details) and not be a mock interface or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just rename unrelated items to match the target names.
integrity.visual_evidence: The items should have realistic metadata (publication, volume, pages) visible in the right pane, matching the target papers.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target Collection: 'Manuscript 2024'. Target Tag: 'cited'.
Target Papers:
1. Turing (1936): 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem'
2. Shannon (1948): 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication'
3. Vaswani (2017): 'Attention Is All You Need'
4. Silver (2016): 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search'
Distractor Papers (MUST NOT BE IN COLLECTION):
1. Turing (1950): 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence'
2. Shannon (1949): 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Note the 'The' and year 1949).
